'''Lormar 23''' was a [[Lormar-class Refinery Station|''Lormar''-class refinery station]].

The station, and another of the same class, were deployed to the [[Mangez system/Legends|Mangez system]] in [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] by the [[Lant Mining Corporation]].
They were operational during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
